headings.style: tracking-tight to tracking-tighter, font-bold to font-black

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12) mixed with dense functional grids for the app interface.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_pages: Bento Grid (Tetris Grid), high contrast, asymmetrical layouts, exposed grid lines.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_apps: Control Room Grid. No rounded corners (rounded-none). Sharp 1px solid borders.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) - exposed skeleton with border-zinc-200. No soft shadows. Crystal Glassmorphism for sticky headers (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-zinc-200).

components_instructions.global: CRITICAL: Apply data-testid to all interactive elements. Use Shadcn customized for sharp corners (rounded-none). HTML/Tailwind only for marketing landing structures.
components_instructions.buttons: Square edges, solid primary color or sharp 1px outlined ghost buttons. Hover states must change text and background color.
components_instructions.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Input fields must have rounded-none, 1px border. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-[#002BF6].
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for a dense, technical look. (Duotone or Regular weight).

pages_and_features.landing_page: Hero section with massive Cabinet Grotesk typography, high-impact Klein Blue primary CTA. Marquee 'Editorial Ribbon' with features using react-fast-marquee. Bento grid showcasing 'WriteGenius' capabilities.
pages_and_features.auth: Split screen layout. Functional minimal form on left, hero abstract image on right.
pages_and_features.dashboard_home: Grid layout showing 5-free/day usage progress bar, quick access to templates, and recent generation history. If usage >= 5, lock feature and show 'Upgrade to Premium'.
pages_and_features.generation_interface: Multi-column layout. Left sidebar for template parameters (Social, Email, etc.), Middle/Right area for results. Clear 'Copy to Clipboard' button with Phosphor copy icon.
pages_and_features.pricing: Clear comparison between Free (5 generations/day) and Premium (Unlimited, Stripe integration). Pricing cards should be stark and functional.

hero_abstract.description: Minimalist 3D geometric shapes for landing page hero or auth screen background.

app_demo.description: Person working on a sleek modern laptop. Use in feature sections.
